top_signals.title: Chip Stocks Hit by AI Spending Worry as Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in chipmakers weighed on stocks amid concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations while higher oil prices lifted bond yields.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve issues initial findings from its 2025 triennial payments study
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve issues initial findings from its 2025 triennial payments study
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock retreats back to IPO price
top_signals.summary: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Truth Social launches service to give Wall Street traders an edge with real-time service
top_signals.summary: Trump Media launched an API to give paying customers real-time access to market-moving Truth Social posts.
